usageStats.title: Usage Statistics
usageStats.desc: Kakai tracks time in each app — this is the main permission for screen control.
usageStats.why: Without it, parents won't see how much time is spent in each app.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.desc: Allows Kakai to block apps when the daily limit is reached.
accessibility.why: Without it, app blocking won't work.

overlay.title: Display Over Other Apps
overlay.desc: Kakai shows a lock screen over blocked apps.
overlay.why: Without it, the lock screen won't appear.

deviceAdmin.title: Device Administrator
deviceAdmin.desc: Protects Kakai from being uninstalled by the child without parents knowing.
deviceAdmin.why: Without it, the child can uninstall the app at any time.

battery.title: Battery Optimization
battery.desc: Disable battery optimization so Kakai runs continuously in the background.
battery.why: Without this, the phone may stop Kakai to save battery.

activity.title: Activity Recognition
activity.desc: Allows tracking of the child's physical activity.
activity.why: Phase 2 feature — can be skipped for now.

pinCode.title: Parent PIN code
pinCode.subtitle: This code protects Kakai settings on the phone
pinCode.hint: Remember this code — it's needed to access settings

scheduleChild.title: Schedule
scheduleChild.subtitle: Kakai will automatically restrict the phone during these times

testBlock.title: Blocking Test
testBlock.subtitle: Let's check that everything works
testBlock.instruction: Minimize Kakai and open any other app.
testBlock.hint: If blocking doesn't work — check permissions from previous steps.

complete.title: Phone is set up!
complete.subtitle: Kakai is protecting the device and sending data to parents in real time.

home.title: Hi, %{name}!

personalized.title: With Kakai you can:
personalized.screenTime: See exact time spent in each app
personalized.sleep: Automatically turn off the phone at night

quizScreenTime.question: Do you know how much time %{name} spends on their phone?
quizScreenTime.empathyYes: Many parents are surprised to see the exact numbers. Kakai will show real statistics for every app.
quizScreenTime.empathyNo: You're not alone — most parents don't know the exact numbers. Average screen time for kids is 6 hours a day.

featureStats.title: 2.5x less screen time with Kakai
featureStats.subtitle: Average result in the first 30 days

quizBlock.question: Do you need to block %{name}'s phone at certain times?
quizBlock.yes: Yes, during school and at night
quizBlock.empathyYes: Great decision. Block scheduling is Kakai's most effective tool according to parent reviews.
quizBlock.empathyNo: Block scheduling is the feature 8 out of 10 parents call the most useful after the first week.

featureBlock.title: Block games with one tap
featureBlock.subtitle: Or set a schedule: school, sleep, family dinner

quizIrritability.question: Do you notice %{name} getting irritable when you take the phone away?
quizIrritability.empathyYes: This is a sign of digital dependency. Don't blame yourself — it's a physiological brain response to dopamine. Kakai helps reduce it gently, gradually.
quizIrritability.empathyNo: Wonderful! Kakai will help maintain this balance and prevent dependency as they grow.

featureReviews.title: What parents say about Kakai
featureReviews.r1: "In a month, my son started putting the phone down on his own. Didn't expect that!"
featureReviews.r2: "Finally know where my daughter is after school. Peace of mind is priceless."
featureReviews.r3: "Grades improved in 2 months. Recommend to all parents."

quizWorry.question: Do you worry when %{name} is not with you?
quizWorry.empathyYes: Completely understandable. Kakai GPS updates every 5 minutes — you'll always know where your child is.
quizWorry.empathyNo: That's great. GPS tracking will give even more peace of mind and help in emergencies.

featureGps.title: Real-time location
featureGps.subtitle: Updates every 5 minutes. Works in the background.

quizSleep.question: Does %{name} use their phone before bed or during school?
quizSleep.no: No, we have it under control
quizSleep.empathyYes: Blue light suppresses melatonin and delays falling asleep by 1–2 hours. Kakai's sleep mode will automatically turn off the phone at the right time.
quizSleep.empathyNo: Excellent! Kakai's schedule will help maintain this routine even when you're not around.
quizSleep.fact: 🔬 Blue light delays falling asleep by 1–2 hours

compare.title: What changes with Kakai
compare.r1w: Don't know how much time is spent on phone
compare.r2w: Conflicts when taking the phone away
compare.r3w: Don't know where your child is
compare.r4w: Phone interferes with school and sleep
